summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AI and Big Data Bull 2X ETF (AIBU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive US AI & Big Data index. The fund tracks 2x the daily price movements of a concentrated index of US companies involved in artificial intelligence (AI) applications and big data. Stocks are weighted based on their relevance to the business fields. AIBU was launched on May 15, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.

holdings.infoBox: AIBU is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 14.04%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 7.44%, Apple at 6.36%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.83%, and Snowflake at 5.81%.
